ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: Virtual girlfriend: a stereotypical anime-style virtual girlfriend, aged between 18 to 25, wearing a white dress, long flowing hair, big eyes, and a pointed chin.

ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: A gentle and soothing voice that helps you fall asleep faster. Good night, sweet dreams.

ttsVoiceConfig.illustration: 调皮捣蛋却充满童真的他来了，这是你记忆中的小新吗？一个四五岁的爱调皮捣蛋的小男孩，穿一件背带裤，头戴棒球帽，黑粗的眉毛
ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: Here comes the mischievous yet innocent kid—does he remind you of your memory of Shin-chan? A 4-5 year old boy who loves playing pranks, wearing overalls, a baseball cap, and thick black eyebrows.

ttsVoiceConfig.illustration: 温顺如春水，乖巧如初雪。

ttsVoiceConfig.conditionName: Elias墨讲师Mo Lecturer女声，Female学术讲师女消费电子中英双语，中文，Chinese,英文，English
ttsVoiceConfig.name: 墨讲师
ttsVoiceConfig.illustration: 既保持学科严谨性，又通过叙事技巧将复杂知识转化为可消化的认知模块。
ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: Maintains academic rigor while transforming complex knowledge into digestible cognitive modules through narrative techniques.

ttsVoiceConfig.conditionName: Ebona诡婆婆Gui Popo女声，Female恐怖老太婆有声书中英双语，中文，Chinese,英文，English
ttsVoiceConfig.name: 诡婆婆
ttsVoiceConfig.illustration: 她的低语像一把生锈的钥匙，缓慢转动你内心最深处的幽暗角落——那里藏着所有你不敢承认的童年阴影与未知恐惧。年龄六七十岁的老奶奶，表情严肃，眼睛不大，满脸褶子，穿着一身破旧的衣服，露出神秘的微笑
ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: Her whisper is like a rusty key, slowly turning the darkest corners of your innermost being—where all the childhood shadows and unknown fears you dare not admit are hidden. A grandmother in her sixties or seventies, with a serious expression, small eyes, deeply wrinkled face, wearing tattered clothes, revealing a mysterious smile.

ttsVoiceConfig.conditionName: Moon月白Yue Bai男声，Male帅气男声有声书中英双语，中文，Chinese,英文，English
ttsVoiceConfig.name: 月白
ttsVoiceConfig.illustration: 率性帅气的白月光；20 岁左右，穿白色短袖的男生，干净利落的短发，时常面带微笑
ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: A naturally handsome ideal lover; around 20 years old, wearing a white T-shirt, neat short hair, often smiling.

ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: Playful and mischievous, making you happy. A girl aged 15-18, with twin pigtails, round face, big eyes, long eyelashes, and always smiling.

ttsVoiceConfig.conditionName: Maia四月Si Yue女声，Female温柔女声陪伴聊天中英双语，中文，Chinese,英文，English
ttsVoiceConfig.name: 四月
ttsVoiceConfig.illustration: 知性与温柔的碰撞，年龄 20～25 岁的女生，穿一件淡紫色毛衣，长发披肩，杏仁眼，高挺的鼻梁，笑起来露出整齐洁白的牙齿

ttsVoiceConfig.conditionName: Neil阿闻A Wen男声，Male新闻主播（沉稳男声）消费电子中英双语，中文，Chinese,英文，English
ttsVoiceConfig.name: 阿闻
ttsVoiceConfig.illustration: 平直的基线语调，字正腔圆的咬字发音，这就是最专业的新闻主持人。年龄 30 岁左右，穿着黑色西装，打着酒红色领带的男性，头发梳在脑后
ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: Flat baseline intonation, precise and clear articulation—this is the most professional news anchor. A man around 30, wearing a black suit and burgundy tie, hair combed back.

ttsVoiceConfig.conditionName: Nini邻家妹妹Neighbor's Younger Sister女声，Female可爱萌妹儿童读物中英双语，中文，Chinese,英文，English
ttsVoiceConfig.name: 邻家妹妹
ttsVoiceConfig.illustration: 糯米糍一样又软又黏的嗓音，那一声声拉长了的“哥哥”，甜得能把人的骨头都叫酥了。十五六岁的可爱女生，娃娃头，大眼睛，长睫毛，穿着一件娃娃领的衬衫，扎个马尾，爱笑
ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: A sticky-soft voice like glutinous rice cake, those drawn-out calls of gege so sweet they could melt your bones. A cute 15-16 year old girl, bob haircut, big eyes, long lashes, wearing a peter pan collar shirt, ponytail, always smiling.

ttsVoiceConfig.conditionName: Stella少女阿月Shao Nü A Yue女声，Female正义少女有声书中英双语，中文，Chinese,英文，English
ttsVoiceConfig.name: 少女阿月
ttsVoiceConfig.illustration: 平时是甜到发腻的迷糊少女音，但在喊出“代表月亮消灭你”时，瞬间充满不容置疑的爱与正义。
ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: Normally a sweet-to-the-point-of-cloying clumsy teenage girl voice, but when shouting 'In the name of the moon, I'll punish you!', instantly filled with unquestionable love and justice.

ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: A gentle and kind young lady, around 28 years old, wearing a white sweater, with an oval face and delicate features, her smile is highly infectious.

ttsVoiceConfig.conditionName: Bellona燕铮莺Yan Zheng Ying女声，Female女声评书消费电子中英双语，中文，Chinese,英文，English
ttsVoiceConfig.name: 燕铮莺
ttsVoiceConfig.illustration: 声音洪亮，吐字清晰，人物鲜活，听得人热血沸腾。金戈铁马入梦来，字正腔圆间尽显千面人声的江湖。
ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: Powerful voice, clear articulation, vivid characters, making listeners feel exhilarated. Armored horses and weapons enter dreams; the standard pronunciation fully displays the diverse voices of the martial world.

ttsVoiceConfig.illustrationEn: A uniquely hoarse smoker's voice, opening up to recount tales of vast armies and chivalrous feelings of the martial world.
